title: Peer/* ClearMessage variants explicitly ignored in non-daemon clients
description: PeerDeliver, PeerReceipt, PeerTyping, PeerRetract, PeerGroupUpdate are explicitly matched and ignored in bot/dispatcher.rs, cli/commands.rs, and tui/event.rs with comments directing to nie-daemon. A contributor might suggest 'handling' them or marking them as unreachable. The explicit ignore with comment is correct: these message types flow through the relay to all clients, so non-daemon clients WILL receive them and must handle them gracefully (no panic, no warning noise).
close_reason: decision recorded in beads for future contributor reference
